text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Dammit! I was one step away!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The top spot coulda been mine... The hell's wrong
with me?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What kinda lukewarm comment izzat? I'll never
be able to shine on the grand stage thinkin' like
that!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We're not gonna leave here pattin' ourselves on
the back! Ya hear? Get movin' 'n' set up a review
session!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go splash some cold water on my face
to get my head back in the game.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That goes without sayin'! I won't relive this
disappointment ever again!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I really gotta blow 'em away in the next race!
Yeah, a bang big and bright enough to make up
for today!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So what're we still doin' here? Let's hurry back!
